name: MemoryOS OpenClaw Adapter
description: OpenClaw connector surface for MemoryOS.v1 with managed bootstrap, canonical memory, and operational skills.

autoSetup.description: Automatically scaffold shared memory, shared skills, and predefined agent workspaces when the plugin first loads.

stateDir.description: Override the OpenClaw state directory used for bootstrap.

workspaceRoot.description: Override the workspace root that will contain per-agent workspaces and the shared system directory.

systemRoot.description: Override the shared system root that will contain memory, skills, tasks, policy, docs, and scripts.

memoryRoot.description: Override the shared canonical memory root. Defaults to <systemRoot>/memory.

configPath.description: Override the openclaw.json path used during bootstrap.

overwrite.description: Allow auto-setup to overwrite managed files and symlinks.

writeConfig.description: Allow auto-setup to write managed agent and skill configuration into openclaw.json.

bindings.description: Optional setup bindings in agent=channel[:accountId[:peerId]] form.
